verdict: Medicated shampoo with coal tar and salicylic acid for scalp conditions, not optimal for general body care. Therapeutic category limits versatility despite proven efficacy.

_research.name: Neutrogena T/Gel Therapeutic Shampoo Original
pros: Coal tar proven for psoriasis/seborrheic dermatitis
_research.con: Specialized scalp treatment; coal tar has regulatory scrutiny and unpleasant odor.
